title: Longing
description:
Name the person or persons you refuse to let go of:

____longing____

bullets: When you spend the night watching them, regain all your HP or clear all your debilities.
When they rebuff you or recoil from you, mark a consequence (see reverse).
When they die peacefully and pass through the Black Gates, so do you.
Should they be taken from you violently, mark the Final Consequence (see reverse).

title: Vengeance
description:
Name the person or persons who must pay:

____vengeance____

bullets: When you make one of them pay and make sure they know why, regain all your HP or clear all your debilities.
When they defeat or escape you, mark a consequence (see reverse).
When you kill the last of them, pass through the Black Gates.
Should they die before you're finished with them, mark the Final Consequence (see reverse).

title: Duty
description:
Name the task you refuse to leave undone:

____duty____

bullets: When you spend the night working on your task or reach a milestone, regain all your HP or clear all your debilities.
When you fail to perform your task or suffer a material setback, mark a consequence (see reverse).
When the task is finally complete, pass through the Black Gates.
Should the task become impossible to perform, mark the Final Consequence (see reverse).
